reviews.review_description: Absolutely disgusting they just charged you to watch credits and replay what you already played in the free version dont bother buying 😡

developer_response.body: We don't charge to watch credits. The free version only has the first stage, the paid version has all 5 stages. Maybe you encountered a technical problem? We may be able to help solve this. Which headset have you been using?

reviews.review_description: It was one of the best games I have played

Wow.... just... amazing!!!!!!!! I am a magician, and may I say that from a magicians point of view, this was just awesome A dream come true, really. I downloaded the first chapter on the day of release back in July, and checked the ApeLab Blog everyday looking for a release date. When I finally found it, I anxiously awaited it's arrival. I played it as soon as it was released (I was one of the ones who accidentally played it for free;D), but didn't finish it. I bought it shortly after, and started the whole thing over. I finished up the game yesterday, and I was very impressed. WARNING: SLIGHT SPOILERS TO FOLLOW. STOP READING IF YOU DON'T WANT MINOR SPOILERS. Now that that's out of the way, I must also add that I am a huge fan of animatronics and puppetry, so when I got to the room and made the animatronics alien, I was ecstatic! I felt like I was in a dream. And the ending!!!!! It was amazing yet painful at the same time!
I could go on and on about this game! Granted there were a few minor glitches and bugs, it was an epic experience! 100/10, highly recommend. I NEED A SEQUEL!!!!!!!!!!!!! 
-Steleeflag

developer_response.body: What an amazing review ! Especially coming from a magician, we can't tell you how much this means :)  Thanks and Happy Holidays from the whole team.

reviews.review_description: The game is very good! But I often had moments when I didn't know what to do, and it, unfortunately, spoiled the impression

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review. If you wish to share those moments with us, please drop us a line on dev@apelab.ch. We'd love to know in more details where we can improve instructions. Happy New Year !  - The Ape Team.

reviews.review_description: I don’t even have to describe it!
Stuck in Close room can't figure out the cards.. 😕
I love this game im really glad i brought it, it has great graphics and a great detail ♡♡♡♡

developer_response.body: Thanks we greatly appreciate the review ! - Happy Holiday from the team-

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games
reviews.review_description:
I have an Oculus Go. Works great on it, not sure what other reviews were talking about. 

I mean, wow. This game was extremely well done. The humanoid creatures were creepy and original and the story was fun and exciting. I’d love to see more magic based VR games like this. This is so so good. 
Only downside is how short it is. I could play it all day, just doing different magic tricks on stage even. Sadly, it only has 5 acts. Overall the game is amazing and definitely worth the $3. 

Tip: when the game tells you to blow on your controller, shake it instead.
This game was the best game once I played the demo I knew I had to get it. I got stuck on 1 part but then I figured it out. It’s so immersive and it’s super fun I just wish it was longer.
Just bought the game and it is already amazing, tried the demo first and I immediately bought the game, a sure treat

The game is pretty awsome but i have some issues...

...first i have a problen with the 3. Stage. Its like a boss level and i dont know what i should do when the Voice says "lets get out of here". I tryed everything but nothing works. I think they have to explain more what should we do.
... second i would like to have some more stages and some tips you can collect.
In this part of Development there are 30-45 mind of play time - wich is very low for 2€!

So...
Yes you should buy it if you like crazy-wizzard-games and you like to play games again and again.
But... 
you have to know that it is a very short story and that you can be at a place where you dont know the answer. 
And...
If you like action/open choise-games you should buy something like "Please dont touch anything" but not this game. For thus kund of gamers it becomes after a ehile boring and you dont play it anymore.
A wonderful game, great fun, just wondering what happened when it ended, can't believe I got swindled

developer_response.body: Thanks James for the review. - The Apelab Team -

reviews.review_description:
I have been in the midst of this game/adventure, and suddenly the game shuts off- this happened several times and got me pissed off. Each time I had to start over- I wasn’t at a new checkpoint yet. 
Also, the control can “grab” items and push them further away ok, but bringing the items closer does not work!  Very annoying. If these glitches were worked out it’d be a solid 4-stars.
Good, too short, needs longer
Sweet game!! It is my first game I have purchased for the oculus. Gaming is way better on this game then any other game I have ever played. I love it!!👍🥳🤪🤩
It has so many activities
I love this game! Very interactive and unique, I definitely suggest it to new VR users! Though I wish it was longer. Still a amazing experience and I will be re-playing it!
It is a cool game but your progress does get saved.
With all the copycat games out there today, it is so refreshing when something new and different comes along! I hope to see more titles from this developer! Thank you!
This game is the best thing but I have some issues with it.
